rationale: The cited 2007 paper appears directly relevant to the citing paper’s core mechanism tests: both focus on calorie-estimation errors, and the citing note explicitly contrasts its categorization account with alternatives like diminishing sensitivity while manipulating holistic vs. piecemeal estimation (a key debiasing construct in the cited note).
